Name: Rite Of The Ban Shared
Description:
With this Rite, the participants agree to adhere to a tribal Ban not of their own. Following a Ban in this way incurs no mechanical impact outside of roleplay. This Rite is often used as a way for a Garou to repay a debt incurred to a member of another tribe or to show respect to a particular Tribal Patron.
The Adopted Responsibility Rite is quite simple. All that is needed is a public pledge to the Patron and the destruction of small but appropriate sacrifice.
